description: You are an OLPC deployment coordinator. Clone the system's default Calculate activity (located in /usr/share/sugar/activities/Calculate.activity) to create a custom activity at /home/ga/Activities/MathTools.activity. Reconfigure the new bundle's metadata file (activity/activity.info) with the following fields: name 'Math Tools', bundle_id 'org.laptop.MathTools', icon 'math-tools', and summary 'A dedicated calculator for math class'. Ensure the activity's SVG icon file is renamed to match the new icon property. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/activity_clone_report.txt containing the original bundle_id on the first line and the new bundle_id (org.laptop.MathTools) on the second line.

metadata.expected_summary: A dedicated calculator for math class.
